# Earth Echo

> Track and reduce your environmental impact with human-readable metrics, gamification, and community support.

Earth Echo is a carbon footprint and environmental impact tracking platform. Users log their daily activities across six categories — carbon emissions, water usage, plastic consumption, recycling, transport, and sustainable shopping — and receive personalised insights, badges, and challenges to encourage greener habits.

## Core Features

- **Activity Tracking**: Log carbon, water, plastic, recycling, transport, and shopping impacts with intuitive forms and real-time feedback.
- **Dashboard**: Personalised overview with impact summaries, streak tracking, weekly trends, and comparison to community averages.
- **Badges & Achievements**: Earn badges for milestones (e.g., 7-day streaks, first log, zero-waste days).
- **Challenges**: Join community challenges with deadlines and leaderboards.
- **Leaderboard**: Global and period-filtered rankings by points, badges, and streaks.
- **Community Forum**: Discuss sustainability topics, share tips, and support each other.
- **Guides**: Curated sustainability guides on reducing waste, saving water, and lowering carbon footprint.
- **Eco App Directory**: Curated list of third-party eco-friendly apps and tools.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, TypeScript
- **Backend**: Next.js Server Actions, API Routes
- **Database**: MySQL/MariaDB via Prisma ORM
- **Authentication**: Auth.js v5 (Google, Facebook, email/password, WebAuthn/passkeys)
- **Native Apps**: Capacitor 8 (Android, iOS planned)
- **Push Notifications**: Web Push (VAPID) + Firebase Cloud Messaging (native)
- **Hosting**: Ubuntu VPS (earthecho.co.uk)

- [Cookie Policy](https://earthecho.co.uk/cookies) — Cookie usage and consent
